title: startRecording
description: Start recording the current browser viewport. Must be followed by a `stopRecording` action. Only runs when the context `app` is `chrome` and `headless` is `false`. Supported extensions: [ '.mp4', '.webm', '.gif' ]

retries.description: Maximum number of times to retry a step if it fails.

retryAfter.description: Number of milliseconds to wait before retrying a step.

path.description: File path of the recording. Supports the `.mp4`, `.webm`, and `.gif` extensions. If not specified, the file name is the ID of the step, and the extension is `.mp4`.

directory.description: Directory of the file. Attempts to create the directory if it doesn't exist.

overwrite.description: If `true`, overwrites the existing file at `path` if it exists.
